properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 72/18
NORWEGIAN SEA. 
TORPEDO FIRING EXERCISES.
A TORPEDO FIRING EXERCISE WILL TAKE PLACE WHITHIN A RADIUS OF 10NM FROM THE FOLLOWING POSITION:
JUNE 21ST 2018 01:00 PM - 09:00 PM (LOCAL TIME)
WGS84 DATUM
N70-10.0 E015-00.0

THE AREA WILL BE AFFECTED BY UNDERWATER FIRING EXERCISES (IF THE SHOOTING RANGE IS CLEAR).
THE REGION WILL REMAIN OPEN FOR NAVIGATION. DURING THE FIRING PRACTICES VESSELS WILL SHOW THE
SIGNAL NE 4 IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE INTERNATIONAL CODE OF SIGNALS. VESSELS PARTICIPATING IN
THE FIRING PRACTICES WILL SHOW ONLY THE LIGHTS AND SHAPES REQUIRED BY COLREG AND THE
TRAFFIC REGULATIONS FOR NAVIGABLE WATERWAYS.
CHARTS: 303, 321, 515.
